name: image_read
description: Read and analyze an image using a vision-capable model.

image_path.description: Path or URI of the image to analyze. Accepts: local file path, URL (http/https), workspace://, attach://, yao://, or data URI.

prompt.description: What to analyze about the image (default: describe in detail)
prompt.default: Please describe this image in detail.

max_size.description: Max dimension in pixels for the longest edge. Image is resized (preserving aspect ratio) before sending to the vision model. Default 1080.
